idea-plugin.name: Dependency Assistant
idea-plugin.description:
Provides assisted upgrading of Maven dependencies and plugins in a Maven project.
Displays the current version and suggests an update when a newer version is available from the project's configured Maven repositories. The support includes:
  • Scanning of an open pom.xml file containing dependencies and plugins (direct, managed, and using properties)
  • Determining version update candidates
  • Selection of dependencies and plugins to update
  • Supports Maven Central and repositories defined in the POM file (does not yet support authentication)

Usage

  • Open a pom.xml file in the editor.
  • Use the intention action (light bulb) to check for updates of dependencies and plugins.
  • Alternatively, to use the Menu action tool window, select Tools | Update Maven Plugins and Dependencies.

Notes

The currently open pom.xml file is used to apply updates to. The plugin considers all active Maven projects to scan for dependencies and only suggests plugins and dependencies whose version can be determined from the currently open pom.xml file.

GitHub Repository: mp911de/dependency-assistant
